name: CS50x: Introduction to Computer Science
description: Harvard's intro to CS — C, Python, algorithms, data structures, memory, and a final project. A rigorous foundation in how computers and programs actually work under the hood.

name: AP Computer Science A
description: Java fundamentals, object-oriented design, data structures, and algorithmic problem solving — the formal coursework behind a lot of self-taught tinkering.

name: CompTIA Network+
description: Studying networking fundamentals — protocols, subnetting, routing, and troubleshooting — to put a formal credential behind the hands-on networking from my homelab.

name: Linux & Self-Hosting Fundamentals
description: Continuous, hands-on learning across Linux administration, containers, reverse proxies, and monitoring — driven by running and maintaining real services at home.
